holdings.infoBox: REGS is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.35%, Apple at 7.72%, Broadcom at 6.75%, Alphabet at 5.60%, and Microsoft at 5.12%.

overview.description: The Columbia Large Cap Growth ETF (REGS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in US large-cap stocks. The selection process combines fundamental analysis with signals like price momentum and investor sentiment. REGS was launched on Nov 20, 1992 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
